---
title: "MB5370 Module 04. Workshop 1 - Introduction"
author: "Alexa Hoffman"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 2.25 Assignment: Plot Deconstruction

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Load data
lgbtq <- read.csv("/Users/alexa/Desktop/Data_Analysis/MB5370_Techniques/MB5370_Module_4_Hoffman/data/lgbtq_acceptance.csv")

# Re-ordering most to least accepting
lgbtq$relationship <- factor(lgbtq$relationship, 
                              levels = c("Siblings", "Friends", "Parents", "Co-workers", "Extended family"))

# Reference line data
lgbtq_ref <- data.frame(
  relationship = factor(c("Siblings", "Friends", "Parents", "Co-workers", "Extended family"),
                        levels = c("Siblings", "Friends", "Parents", "Co-workers", "Extended family")),
  all_lgbtq = c(69, 61, 46, 45, 27)
)

# Plot
ggplot(data = lgbtq, mapping = aes(x = group, y = percent, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_hline(data = lgbtq_ref, aes(yintercept = all_lgbtq),
             linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40",
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  facet_wrap(~ relationship, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Not all LGBTQ adults experience the same acceptance",
    subtitle = "Transgender adults consistently report lower acceptance, particularly from parents and co-workers",
    x = NULL,
    y = "% saying all have been accepting",
    fill = "Identity group",
    caption = "Source: Pew Research Center, Jan. 8-19, 2025"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("lgbtq_acceptance_plot.png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
